Who We Are

Sacramento's Trusted Pressure Washing Experts

Lanidom Pressure Washing Services started with a simple goal: to provide Sacramento residents with reliable and effective exterior cleaning solutions. Frustrated by the lack of quality and attention to detail in the industry, we set out to build a company that prioritizes customer satisfaction and delivers exceptional results.

We believe in doing the job right the first time. Our approach is simple: thorough assessment, careful preparation, and precise execution. We use professional-grade equipment and eco-friendly cleaning solutions to protect your property and the environment.

As a local Sacramento business, we're committed to giving back to the community. We regularly support local charities and organizations, and we strive to be a responsible and ethical business partner.

12+ Years
800+ Projects
97% Satisfaction

Our Difference

Why Choose Lanidom Pressure Washing Services

Experienced Professionals

Years of experience tackling Sacramento's toughest grime and stains.

Eco-Friendly Solutions

Safe for your family, pets, and the environment. We use biodegradable cleaning agents.

Detailed Cleaning

We don't cut corners. Our meticulous approach guarantees exceptional results.

Satisfaction Guaranteed

We're not happy until you are. If you're not satisfied, we'll make it right.

Client Feedback

What Our Clients Say

“

Lanidom Pressure Washing did an amazing job on my house! It was covered in algae and dirt, and now it looks brand new. They were professional, efficient, and very reasonably priced. Highly recommend!

Maria S. House Washing
“

My driveway was a mess with oil stains. Lanidom Pressure Washing came out and did a great job cleaning it. There are a couple of stubborn stains that didn't come completely out, but overall, I'm very happy with the service.

David K. Driveway Cleaning
“

Our deck was covered in mildew after the winter. Lanidom Pressure Washing cleaned it thoroughly and made it look beautiful again. They were careful not to damage the wood and even offered to seal it for us. Great service!

Jennifer L. Deck Cleaning
“

I had a wooden fence that was turning green with algae. Lanidom Pressure Washing cleaned it perfectly. The fence looks fantastic now. They were punctual, professional, and did a great job for a fair price.

Robert B. Fence Cleaning
“

Lanidom Pressure Washing cleaned my gutters quickly and efficiently. They removed a ton of leaves and debris, and now my gutters are draining properly. I'm so glad I called them!

Susan M. Gutter Cleaning
“

I had moss growing on my roof, and Lanidom Pressure Washing cleaned it off without any problems. They were careful not to damage the shingles and did a great job cleaning up afterwards. Would definitely use them again.

Michael P. Roof Cleaning

Our Portfolio

Our Recent Work

Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

What is soft washing, and why is it better than pressure washing?
Soft washing uses low pressure and specialized cleaning solutions to remove dirt and grime without damaging your siding. Pressure washing can be too harsh and can potentially damage delicate surfaces.
How often should I have my house washed?
We recommend having your house washed every 1-2 years, depending on the level of dirt and grime buildup. Homes in areas with heavy tree cover or poor drainage may require more frequent cleaning.
Are your cleaning solutions safe for my plants and pets?
Yes, we use eco-friendly and biodegradable cleaning solutions that are safe for your plants, pets, and family. We take precautions to protect your landscaping during the cleaning process.
